title: Add doctor diagnostics for missing or stale Brandie review-pack references
description: Teach Sentinel Doctor to detect common brand-aware Atlas integration mistakes such as missing Brandie bindings, stale review-pack ids, or unresolved product overrides, so migration failures become actionable.
acceptanceCriteria: Doctor can identify missing or stale Brandie review-pack references in Atlas-backed inputs
Diagnostics explain whether the failure belongs to Brandie export, Atlas binding, or Sentinel consumption
Suggested fixes are concrete enough for adopters to act on quickly
Tests or fixtures cover at least one missing-reference and one stale-reference case
proofRequirements: doctor tests or proof output show brand-aware diagnostics
docs mention the new diagnostic category
